title: crataegus × smithii
intro: Crataegus × smithii, a hybrid hawthorn species, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus × smithii are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various cardiovascular issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving heart function, and alleviating symptoms of angina and arrhythmia. Crataegus × smithii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy for heart health issues.
